About Me

Security-Focused
& Driven

Junior Penetration Tester focused on web application security with hands-on experience in API testing and network security. I bring a methodical and research-oriented approach to identifying vulnerabilities.

I'm an active CTF participant with skills in Active Directory testing and proficiency across industry-standard tools like Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nmap, and Nessus.
